final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photo of a professional gym scene featuring an athlete performing a deadlift.

Style/medium: needs an "工业风" aesthetic with masculine energy — references in the spirit of 1990s New York loft conversion photography, Kinfolk magazine raw-material editorial style, Tokyo 倉庫系 gym interior design movement; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must capture the deadlift moment with emphasis on muscular definition
Subject: must include an athlete with defined muscle lines performing a deadlift
Scene/backdrop: must include a professional gym with industrial-style interior design
Lighting/mood: needs a cool-toned atmosphere emphasizing sweat and power aesthetics — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a cool-toned direction — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: needs raw industrial surface treatment — exact grain / sheen / weight is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve the sense of sweat and power beauty, masculine energy
Avoid:
